anomalies.title: Publishable intel critically low: 0.9%
anomalies.root_cause: Enrichment gap: advisories missing CVSS ≥ 7.0, verified IOCs, and TTP attribution fail trust certification. Source data quality below enterprise publishing threshold.
anomalies.remediation: 1. Enable apex_intelligence_upgrade.py for all HIGH/CRITICAL advisories. 2. Add NVD CVSS enrichment pass. 3. Validate IOC extraction removing source-domain contamination.

anomalies.title: KEV advisories not escalated to P0/P1: 26 KEV items at P3/P4
anomalies.root_cause: SOC scoring engine doesn't have CVSS scores for KEV advisories (from base feed_manifest.json). KEV items exist in apex_v2_manifest.json but coordinator runs against feed_manifest.json which lacks enrichment fields.
anomalies.remediation: 1. Run ocios_coordinator.py with --manifest data/apex_v2_manifest.json. 2. Ensure feed_manifest.json enrichment pass completes before OCIOS run. 3. Verify kev_present field propagation in enrichment pipeline.

anomalies.title: Enterprise risk posture: CRITICAL | ALE: $64,333,500
anomalies.root_cause: Portfolio contains actively exploitable KEV vulnerabilities with high financial exposure. Ransomware and APT TTPs present across corpus.
anomalies.remediation: 1. Immediately patch all KEV-confirmed CVEs. 2. Activate SOC incident response for top P0/P1 items. 3. Validate backup and DR posture for ransomware-linked advisories.

anomalies.title: Corpus trust score below threshold: 38.7/100
anomalies.root_cause: Partial enrichment — CVSS and EPSS data present for subset of advisories only.
anomalies.remediation: Prioritize CVSS/EPSS backfill for KEV-confirmed and HIGH severity advisories.

anomalies.title: Platform health score degraded: 47.7/100 (grade F)
anomalies.root_cause: Multiple subsystems operating below threshold. Weakest subsystem: [threat_coverage] at 0.0/100.
anomalies.remediation: Follow recommendations in platform_health_dashboard.json. Prioritize P0/P1 actions first.
